allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { node --version; npm --version; Write-Output $node.Source } else { Write-Output "NODE_NOT_FOUND" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Common Node paths ==="; @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $_" } }; Write-Output "=== nvm ==="; if \(Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { nvm version } else { Write-Output "no nvm" }; Write-Output "=== winget ==="; if \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "winget available" } else { Write-Output "no winget" }; Write-Output "=== fnm/volta ==="; @\("fnm","volta"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Get-Command $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "$_ available" } })
